scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:all:prod: npm run build:prod && npm run build:prod:firefox
scripts.build:all:store: npm run build:chrome:store && npm run build:firefox:amo
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome:store && node scripts/package-extension.mjs dist-chrome web-ext-artifacts/twitch-social-rating-chrome-$npm_package_version.zip
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox:amo && node scripts/package-extension.mjs dist-firefox web-ext-artifacts/twitch-social-rating-firefox-$npm_package_version.zip
scripts.package:all: npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox
scripts.amo:sign:unlisted: npm run build:firefox:amo && npx web-ext sign --source-dir dist-firefox --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --channel unlisted
